title: 1.1: Tests that abort is triggered during VU initialization when multiple VUs are configured
1.2: Tests that abort is triggered from within the default function with noLinger and withLinger subtests
1.3: Tests that abort is triggered from within a group block with noLinger and withLinger subtests
1.4: Tests that abort is triggered from the setup lifecycle function with noLinger and withLinger subtests
1.5: Tests that abort is triggered from the teardown lifecycle function with noLinger and withLinger subtests
2.1: Places the test for abort during VU initialization in cmd/tests/cmd_run_test.go
2.2: Places the test for abort from default function in cmd/tests/cmd_run_test.go
2.3: Places the test for abort from group block in cmd/tests/cmd_run_test.go
2.4: Places the test for abort from setup function in cmd/tests/cmd_run_test.go
2.5: Places the test for abort from teardown function in cmd/tests/cmd_run_test.go
3.1: All tests use the Go testing framework with t *testing.T parameter
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern TestXxx or Test_xxx
3.3: All tests call t.Parallel() for parallel test execution
4.1: Follows the pattern of passing a message argument to exec.test.abort()
4.2: Follows the pattern of defining handleSummary and asserting its output after abort
